text:
DFCLTY_ATTN_ADMSN_CD DFCLTY_ATTN_ADMSN_CD Delirium: Inattention (Adm) CHAR 1 At the time of admission, did the patient have difficulty focusing attention, for example, being easily distractible or having difficulty keeping track of what was being said? 0 = Behavior not present 
1 = Behavior continuously present, does not fluctuate 
2 = Behavior present, fluctuates (comes and goes, changes in severity) 
- = Not Assessed/No Information
471 DFCLTY_ATTN_DSCHRG_CD DFCLTY_ATTN_DSCHRG_CD Delirium:
